title: Chat message area component with artifact notification support
purpose: Displays chat messages with different rendering logic based on message type and includes artifact navigation links for artifact notifications.
module_context: Exports a React functional component MessageArea that accepts messages and action handlers, and uses viewer store for artifact navigation.

steps.content: Check if the message type is notification.
IF the message is a notification, verify it contains artifact type, id, and name.
Return true if all artifact data fields are present, otherwise return false.

methods.name: getArtifactData
methods.normalized_params: (message: ChatMessage): { type: string; artifactType: string; id: string; name: string } | null

steps.content: Check if the message has a response field.
IF there is no response, return null.
Extract and return the artifact type, id, name, and type from the response.
Access the navigateToArtifact function from the viewer store.
Define a handler for artifact clicks that navigates to the artifact.
Map over each message in the messages array.
For each message, determine if it contains artifact data.
Determine if the message should be rendered as a log based on responded or canceled status.
Render the message header with timestamp and status badges.
Render the message content with appropriate component based on message type.
Navigate to the artifact using the artifact ID and type.
